## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? E.g. `mvn -Dtest=Foo test`, manual UI walkthrough, sample fixture used. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn -B -ntp verify` is green locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavioural changes
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `ci:`, `build:`)
- [ ] User-facing copy is English-only and consistent with existing wording
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant (README, CLAUDE.md, HELP.md)
- [ ] No real fund data committed — synthetic samples only
